raw_text: or combination, + the mental leap occurs. There is no formula as such (it is like Joye's "epiphanies"). As Plato argues, the person really already knows but has in some am not sure he has sense "forgotten." I forgotten; I think it is a latent faculty or possibility of abstracting + derives (as an event: anamnesis itself) from possession of the cognitive capacity to perform the operation. Here aristotle amends Plato but descartes amends Aristotle. + here enters, too, biological evolution, the advance of the species into higher qualitative quantum-leap, not quantitative + incremental) c modes - ways - of thinking + perceiving. I have a feeling that this meta-abstracting is right brain + is a Gestalting + analogic, having to do with comparison ("this is the same as that it is not merely like that; it is that a my "I mother 3 times not 3 mothers" carried to a vast ceap up in inferential "seeing"). the key word. is recognize "I have seen this H-63 before" this may be both a simple, primitive operation - known to animals + birds + lizards as well as men - but it may contain ultra‐ sophisticated possibilities; that is, it may be possible that it can be applied in an extra ordinary way that results in a radically i restructured Dasein, way of being in world world experienced in new terms, self experienced My theory (as I've stated) is that o in new terms there are several stages - each radically different from the others - of abstracting along an axis in which at the low end an infinitude of transcent concrete particulars is experienced - total flux, total chaos, without pattern, order or regularity - + then various levels of pattern, order + regularities are grasped; these are not just logical categories that the percipient's mind utilizes as a means to confer order but (I think) are perceptions of order actually out there. E.g. it really is the same mother 3 times, not 3 mothers. So this amounts to more than a way of cataloging experience; it has to do with "seeing" regularities, + this is a categorizing + abstracting in terms of constants, the result of which is the possibility of knowledge (I guess the necessary assumption here is that world is intrinsically cosmos, not chaos, + its structure is discovered - discerned. The question Then is, how far can these discoveries of order, pattern, structure + regularily be carried" There are two limiting + decisive factors: (1) the intrinsic structure of reality in itself (you cannot discover it of it isn't there); + (2) the conceptualizing, perceiving, thinking, abstract. powers of the percipient. Both (1) + (2) are unknowns. (1) It cannot be said that we absolutely know what structure exists in world intrinsically; it may be far more complex + intricate + other than we soppose (2) given (1). we have no guaranted that our minds (brains). K-64 which are finite + limited can or will discern This structure. The issue, then, of how my Platonist meta-abstraction occurs in a sense is a pointless question, circular, tautological; the answer is (1) the order is there in world - + (2). the capacity to "see" or know or fathom or under stand or conceive it is present in our mind or brain. The answer may be both metaphysical (concerning world) + anatomical (concerning how We can know). There is no difference between this meta-abstraction (in terms of how) + the time in high schoil that I "saw" how archomedes principle works, i.e. comprehended it + then applied it the principle although conceptual applies to actual world; this is a regularity in world behavior. There was a time when I did not comprehend it (but this didn't change world) + Then I understood it + as soon as I understood it could apply it to world in all cases where the I situation obtained. Interestingly, my comprehension came as a revelation as if supernatural in origin, presented to me adventitiously as a gift but still (1) I comprehended it; + (2) it applied to world - the cause of my comprehension does not have significance for either (1) or (2). You could say, "God wanted me to know it" or "a part of my brain/mind was very smart + suddenly under‐ stood it," but (1) + (2) are untouched. It is like Pythagoras + the "tuned" anvils, his leaping to the realization (conception, "seeing") that number is the basis of all, rather than the all possessing some kind of substantia. What is so remarkable about such comprehensions is that they are not just a priori ideas but are abstractions about reality; the intelligible + the sensible are linked necessarily through such abstractions, + This is why I view my axis as an axis passing from the concrete, chaotic + plural at the low end to abstract, orderly + unitary at the high end {Note] This is ➀ V. Note P. K-6 -65 more the way scientific knowledge works than theology works. Hence my insight/apperception of "groove to music" (the universe is information having to do with the arrangement + rearrangement of objects") may be what we would call scientific knowledge/concept, not theological the test would come when someone is able to read the information, + (e.g.) my Ditheon dream may be precisely that (+ of coure the eide may be a "recovery" that - especially has to do with scientic knowledge, even An eidos of which we are imperfect particulars; Christ then, as I now define him, may be a very theoretical rational conceptualization about ourselves + world + not theology at all! in a former life I was Thomas, an apostolic Xtian, + I remembered being him" has to do with reincarnation + the occult + religion (+ marginally philosophy) but ") + at least one other person at another spatiotemporal locus are imperfect instantiati as plural particulars of one intelligible supra‐ may be science, spatiotemporal complex of ideas" although haltingly phrased (what particularly lends credence to the idea that this may fall under the purview of science is, "+ this supratemporal intel ligible complex is knowable by means of certain broad abstracting-processes in which categories of identity are discriminated from categories of resemblance through right-brain feature extraction regarding multiple sets"). That is this eidos or be intelligible category (or complex) can not only known rationally but is known rationally (mis‐ perceived as revelation because of the disruption of the Kantian ordering categories). am say in is that though initially t what appears to be mystical, religious "Thomas) (PKD) is revelation, this Eidos/common + Chris essence" view actually opens up as least the possibility for defining a rational basis for the Christological experiences I have been i K-66 having, by alluding to the possibility that not only is Plato's eidos-theory correct but there may be "person" eide (or one eidos) totally unsuspected by Plato + those following him that would explain the Bible, explain Christ + Christ's nature, mission + whereabouts in rational terms having to do with hierarchies of identity, leveled ( of abstraction, + the relationship between infor‐ mation + reality in which information is regarded as soure of reality, not derived from it, more precisely, it is possible to convert information into substantial reality + back, so that reality is seen as one stage in what is primary info-processing + at that processing's disposal). then most of all is my Ditheon idea in + which two psyches, dys-phased in time, utilize a combined field by which types (several) of feature extraction are possible that mono-psyche man knows nothing of; + this has to do with species evolution + bilateral (brain] hemispheric parity the two psyches are joined through their common c basis, so this presumes that in the hierarchy of life, humans are not the ultimate form). Most exciting of all, a simple time-lay parallaxis analogous to spatial parallaxis seems (1) possible; + (2) yields up incalculable perceptual discrimination otherwise impossible. This is a binary organism like two humans lashed together both as twin dys-phased channels but with one ultimate combined field in which constants register - i.e. that which is common to their 2 separate fields. For the first time in my 27 years of exegesis There arises the issue - not of seeing Christ - but in some way (ditheon) of being - participating in the nature + person of - Christ (de imitati Christi). This idea arose in the ending of "BTA." The Dithean dream, Russ' letter + my re Thoma Christ i K-67 abstraction. note: plurality + the concrete + the chaotic are all directly proportional, plurality I the abstract are inversely proportional + Thus a meta-abstraction - any meta‐ abstraction - by its very nature groups a number of what had been regarded as disparate entities into a category The forms are of course abstractions in that they serve this purpose (moving the percipient's comprehension from plurality along the axis toward unity). Thus the meta-abstraction based on "not mothers but I Mother 3 times" 3 serves as a model abstraction in use. terms. Now, as applied to Christ: if i Christ" is seen (as Russ discusses in his letter) a drawing-together, a converging of loose disparate parts (persons) who each taken alone is not Christ, but when unified, "are; Christ - that is, Christ is t There - Russ is speaking of an abstraction as well as synthesizing process. To see that tim is not Christ, bill is not Christ but that tim/bill (in fact tim/bill langel barefoot) must come together for Christ to exist refers to an abstracting process, mental process, in a percipient who now o distinguishes Christ by this abstraction (which I claim consists in discerning a common essence in two or more things so that they are - or are conceived of as - one K-68 This realization gives weight to my contention that Christ is apprehended by what is essentially a process of abstraction (resembling or actually being Plato's recovery/recollection of the eide). This idea (about Christ) may never have occurred to anyone before (1) Russ' letter + (2) my Ditheon dream both of which derive from "BTA" which in turn derives from 2-3-74. However profound Russ' letters is, it remained for me to see the application of what he says to what I was already dealing with: Plato's recovery of the eide which is (in my opinion) the great abstraction of human experiences apperception of Christ may be available only by a leap in the percipient's powers of abstracting, + if This is the case, there is a direct - even mecessary - link between Christ perceived + an evolution in human reasoning (conceptual logic). The "recognizing" that i speak of as crucial is a seeing of identity of two or more things; that this could apply to Christ So that he is feature-extracted (set to ground) by means of conceptual reasoning is an idea simply beyond compare in its implications because what I have been supposing to be some kind of revelation or supernatural experience may in fact be a very high + unusual order of conceptual reasoning - i.e. abstracting a priori regarding what is seen empirically. granted have considered what I call the "ajna eye" higher faculty a K-69 But I have assumed it to be part of the percept system, not cognition. Well, here is my leap from "groove" to "music"; it has to do with conceptual thinking about what is seen, so that the conception (ab straction) feeds back into the percept system + out of this comes such transformations as set/ground discrimination, seeing objects mutual arrangement as information, Valis am saying but now I camouflaged, etc - something new: by discerning that Thomas derive from a common essence (this in + I itself a meta-abstraction) I then create the Ditheonic mind with its temporal paral laxis (as the next step; i.e. Thomas + I now function in push-pull
